otp.message: Your MesoMed verification code is {code}. It expires in {minutes} minutes.

email.verifyBody: Open this link to verify your email address: {url}

booking_confirmation.sms: MesoMed: Your appointment with {doctorName} is confirmed for {dateTime} at {locationName}.
booking_confirmation.pushBody: Your appointment with {doctorName} is confirmed for {dateTime} at {locationName}.
booking_confirmation.emailBody: Your appointment with {doctorName} is confirmed for {dateTime} at {locationName}.

reschedule_notice.sms: MesoMed: Your appointment with {doctorName} was moved to {dateTime} at {locationName}.
reschedule_notice.pushBody: Your appointment with {doctorName} was moved to {dateTime} at {locationName}.
reschedule_notice.emailBody: Your appointment with {doctorName} was moved to {dateTime} at {locationName}.

cancellation_notice.sms: MesoMed: Your appointment with {doctorName} on {dateTime} at {locationName} was cancelled.
cancellation_notice.pushBody: Your appointment with {doctorName} on {dateTime} at {locationName} was cancelled.
cancellation_notice.emailBody: Your appointment with {doctorName} on {dateTime} at {locationName} was cancelled.

reminder.sms: MesoMed reminder: You have an appointment with {doctorName} tomorrow, {dateTime}, at {locationName}.
reminder.pushBody: You have an appointment with {doctorName} tomorrow, {dateTime}, at {locationName}.
reminder.emailBody: You have an appointment with {doctorName} tomorrow, {dateTime}, at {locationName}.

prescription_issued.sms: MesoMed: {doctorName} issued you a new prescription. Open the app to view it.
prescription_issued.pushBody: {doctorName} issued you a new prescription. Open the app to view it.
prescription_issued.emailSubject: You have a new MesoMed prescription
prescription_issued.emailBody: {doctorName} issued you a new prescription. Open the MesoMed app to view it.

subscription_activated.sms: MesoMed: Your provider subscription is now active.
subscription_activated.pushBody: Your MesoMed provider subscription is now active.
subscription_activated.emailBody: Your MesoMed provider subscription is now active. Your listing is publicly visible.

subscription_expired.sms: MesoMed: Your provider subscription has expired. Renew to keep your listing visible.
subscription_expired.pushBody: Your MesoMed provider subscription has expired. Renew to keep your listing visible.
subscription_expired.emailBody: Your MesoMed provider subscription has expired. Renew to keep your listing visible.

errors.CONFLICT: The request conflicts with the current state.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.PROFILE_ALREADY_CLAIMED: This phone number is already linked to another account.
errors.OTP_DELIVERY_FAILED: We couldn't deliver your verification code. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION: This status change is not allowed.
errors.PHONE_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your phone number first.
errors.PRESCRIPTION_NOT_ACTIVE: Only the active version of a prescription can be changed.
errors.CHANNEL_DISABLED: This communication channel is temporarily disabled.
errors.DESTINATION_NOT_ALLOWED: Messages cannot be sent to this destination.
errors.CHANNEL_BUDGET_EXCEEDED: The daily message limit for this channel has been reached. Please try again tomorrow.
errors.AI_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: The symptom search is receiving too many requests. Please try again later.
